news.summary: The CheckMate 1000, a compact and customizable solution, is designed to boost performance for retailers by reducing long lines, recovering floor space, and enhancing profits. Introduced by Newcastle Systems, a leading provider of workplace mobility solutions, this innovative product is revolutionizing the retail industry. The launch was officially announced in AMESBURY, Mass., on April 16, 2025. Stay ahead of the competition with the Checkmate 1000.
news.headline: Newcastle Systems launches compact CheckMate 1000 mobile POS station to boost retail efficiency, maximize profits.

news.summary: Silver Star Nutrition has recently launched a premium vegan protein powder tailored for athletes and performance enthusiasts. Based in La Crosse, Wisconsin, the product was introduced on April 16, 2025. The brand emphasizes quality, transparency, simplicity, integrity, and innovation in its nutrition offerings. It aims to support athletes through its range of products, with a particular focus on plant-based protein powders.
news.headline: Silver Star Nutrition announces launch of ELITE Plant Protein, a premium vegan protein powder for athletes. La Crosse, Wis. April 16, 2025.

news.summary: A group of dedicated fans in Los Angeles and Times Square have rallied together to fund billboards in support of the canceled Netflix series, Dead Boy Detectives. The crowdfunded effort aims to resurrect the cult hit from its premature cancellation. The billboards in question have garnered significant attention and are making waves in both cities. The initiative showcases the strong fanbase behind the show, with supporters contributing a substantial amount towards the cause. The billboards serve as a visible display of their determination to bring back the beloved series, underscoring the impact of fan-led campaigns in the entertainment industry.
news.headline: Fans are campaigning to revive the canceled series Dead Boy Detectives with billboards in LA and Times Square.

news.summary: A company in Santa Cruz, California, announced on April 16, 2025, that West Peak Sparkling Spirits, a ready-to-drink beverage blended with sparkling water and real juice, has achieved significant milestones. The organization is introducing new products and extending its...
news.headline: Santa Cruz-based RTD brand West Peak Sparkling Spirits reports growth with 3 new SKUs and expanded footprint in California.

news.summary: The New York CineFest 2025 will captivate viewers in New York City from April 24 to April 27 at the LOOK Dine-In Cinemas W57, featuring a stunning display of 100 independent films created by both new talents and accomplished filmmakers. This annual event honors innovative storytelling and promises a diverse selection of cinematic creations.
news.headline: New York CineFest on April 24-27 at LOOK Dine-In Cinemas W57 to feature 100 indie films and star-studded lineup.

news.summary: Jones Street Investment Partners, a private equity real estate firm focusing on multifamily investments in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S., recently sold three properties for a total of $159.5 million. The properties, located in Albany, NY, Hanover, MA, and Norton, MA, were initially acquired as core-plus investments. The successful disposition showcases the firm's expertise in the region's real estate market.
news.headline: Jones Street Investment Partners sold three multifamily properties for $159.5M, achieving a 14.4% Gross IRR.

news.summary: In an effort to enhance workplace communication and create a stronger workforce, Kim Brassor, the Chief Visionary and Strategist at One Voice Evolving: Resilience Reimagined in Lebanon, New Hampshire, is leading a pioneering project. The initiative aims to break the cycle of fragmented communication and promote a more resilient and cohesive work environment. The project commenced on April 16, 2025, and Brassor is leveraging her expertise to revolutionize communication strategies within the organization.
news.headline: Kim Brassor launching initiative to improve workforce communication with One Voice Evolving: Resilience Reimagined.

news.summary: In Windham, Maine on April 16, 2025, Gateway Funnel Pros introduced new payment processing services for marketing agencies using HighLevel software, commonly referred to as GoHighLevel. The company is renowned for its tailored payment gateway solutions and aims to cater specifically to agencies utilizing this software.
news.headline: Gateway Funnel Pros launches payment gateway solutions for marketing agencies using HighLevel CRM software, enhancing payment processing services.

news.summary: In Lismore, Australia, the FedEx Station successfully utilized its specially designed flood barriers during the recent Cyclone Alfred. Despite being categorized as a lower-tier storm, Alfred's prolonged presence led to substantial destruction through intense rainfall, storm surges, and powerful winds along the coast in the days leading up to its arrival on land. The aftermath of Cyclone Alfred is still being felt in the region, prompting extensive cleanup operations and resulting in insurance claims totaling AU $1.2 billion. Numerous businesses and individuals have encountered disruptions and damages due to the cyclone's impact.
news.headline: Flood Risk America protects FedEx station in Lismore, NSW from flooding during Cyclone Alfred causing AU $1.2 billion in insurance losses.

news.summary: In Lynchburg, Virginia, on April 16, 2025, Daryl Calfee, a father of three children and professional in brand building and real estate development, released his first book. This book aims to assist his own children and others in maneuvering through life's challenges. The motivation behind this project stems from the loss of his wife, Johanna, to breast cancer. The book offers guidance and support to young individuals facing similar struggles, highlighting themes of resilience and overcoming adversity.
news.headline: Widowed father Daryl Calfee pens guide "Let's Skip the Bull" after losing wife Johanna to breast cancer, aims to help kids and others.(Character count: 123)

news.summary: In Dubuque, Iowa on April 16, 2025, the Spahn & Rose Lumber Co. announced the appointment of Mike Elsea as the Vice President of Operations for their Southeastern locations. Spahn & Rose is a prominent lumber and building material supplier operating across multiple regions. This newly established position is a strategic move for enhancing operational efficiency in their Southeastern outlets. Mike Elsea will be tasked with overseeing and optimizing operations in these locations, contributing to the company's growth and success.
news.headline: Spahn & Rose Lumber Co. appoints Mike Elsea as VP of Operations for Southeastern locations; new role created in 2025.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on April 16, 2025, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND), (FSE: CWY0) revealed the commencement of its Phase I/IIa clinical trial at the Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine in the U.S. The trial, focusing on their treatment CMND-100, aims to assess its safety, tolerance, and complete pharmacokinetic profile in patients with Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD). This marks a pivotal moment for Clearmind as it signifies the debut of their proprietary CMND-100 platform in a clinical setting. The company's mission is to address under-treated health issues, particularly addictions, weight loss, depression, and anxiety.
news.headline: Clearmind Medicine starts Phase I/IIa clinical trial at Johns Hopkins University to study CMND-100 for Alcohol Use Disorder.

news.summary: DatChat, Inc. (Nasdaq: DATS), a secure messaging and social media company based in New Brunswick, NJ, shared that the European Patent Office has granted a Notice of Allowance for patent application 19 819 920.0 - 1001 dubbed “Systems and Methods of Transforming Electronic Content.” Upon receiving the Notice of Allowance, DatChat is set to proceed with finalizing the issue paperwork, settling the issue fees, and foresees the official issuance of the patent within the following 90 days.
news.headline: DatChat gets Notice of Allowance for European Patent App for digital privacy technology; Patent to be issued in 90 days.

news.summary: Amidst escalating trade tensions and increasing interest rates, QCP Capital, a Singapore-based trading firm, observed a notable shift in the Federal Reserve's focus from inflation to recession risk. According to a recent commentary by QCP, there are indications of a pivot within the Fed towards recession concerns. Despite this shift, Bitcoin has not exhibited characteristics of a safe-haven asset in the current macro environment. Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller's remarks suggesting temporary nature of inflationary pressures further supported this narrative. The bond market experienced turbulence, with the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield climbing to 4.6% and the 30-year yield surpassing 5%, leading to unease in equity and cryptocurrency markets. Market expectations of Fed rate cuts have resulted in pricing for approximately 3.5 cuts.
news.headline: Fed shifting focus to recession risk, Bitcoin not benefiting. Fed turning to recession risk, 10-year Treasury yield at 4.6% and 30-year at 5%. Markets expecting 3.5 rate cuts.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 16, 2025, BBG, the biggest independent commercial real estate services firm in the nation, released its third annual U.S. seniors housing investor survey. The report provides valuable perspectives from industry experts on significant trends projected to influence this alternative sector.
news.headline: BBG's annual survey reveals 2025 market trends in US seniors housing, providing insights from professionals.

news.summary: Prior to the opening bell on Thursday, April 17, Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) is set to reveal its first-quarter financial results. Analysts are anticipating quarterly earnings of 70 cents per share. The bank is projecting quarterly revenue to reach $2.16 billion compared to the previous year's $2.1 billion. Baird analyst David George recently upgraded Fifth Third Bancorp from Neutral to Outperform on April 7. With an annual dividend yield of 4.22% and a quarterly dividend of 37 cents per share ($1.48 annually), some investors are considering the potential gains from the company's dividends. For those aiming to earn $500 per month from Fifth Third Bancorp, the yearly calculation is essential.
news.headline: Fifth Third Bancorp to release Q1 earnings on Apr 17, expected EPS of 70 cents, revenue projected at $2.16 billion. Dividend yield at 4.22%, offering $1.48 per share yearly. Baird analyst upgraded to Outperform. Investors eyeing $500 monthly.

news.summary: Montreal-based Gildan Activewear Inc. (GIL; TSX and NYSE) is set to release its first quarter 2025 financial and operating results on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. A press release will be issued after market closure, followed by a conference call scheduled for the same day at 5:00 PM ET to discuss the Company’s performance. The conference call can be accessed by dialing (800) 715-9871 for Canada and the U.S. or (646) 307-1963 for international callers, with the passcode 4627819# required. A replay will be available for 7 days from 8:00 PM EST by dialing (800) 770-2030 for Canada and the U.S. or (609) 800-9909 for international callers, using the same passcode. Those interested can also access a live audio webcast of the call and the replay at the link provided: Gildan Q1 2025 audio webcast.
news.headline: Gildan Activewear to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025. Conference call at 5:00 PM ET, accessible at (800) 715-9871. Replay available for 7 days.

news.summary: Blue Onion is set to expand its operations thanks to a recent investment led by Viola FinTech. The company plans to utilize the capital to enhance its capabilities in providing fully reconciled, transaction-level data that is precise, auditable, and primed for automation. The investment comes at a crucial time for Blue Onion, as they strive to increase their presence in the market and cater to the needs of their clients. The company, known for being a top subledger in the retail sector, aims to leverage this funding to drive growth and innovation in their services. The investment marks a significant milestone for Blue Onion and underscores their commitment to delivering high-quality financial solutions.
news.headline: Blue Onion secures $10M in Series A funding led by Viola FinTech to provide accurate financial data for AI.

news.summary: In London, a 4-week program offers students the opportunity to explore careers in technology and earn college credit. The program is organized by BrandEd, a prominent provider of industry-immersive education, in collaboration with WIRED, renowned for its in-depth coverage of technology and trends. This initiative aims to equip students with practical knowledge and experience in the tech sector. The program is set to take place from April 16, 2025, and will provide participants with valuable insights into the industry.
news.headline: BrandEd and WIRED launch WIRED Summer Lab in London, a 4-week program for college students to learn about tech careers and earn college credit.

news.summary: A well-known roofing contractor, Bucci Roofing, originally based in North Scituate, Rhode Island, has recently expanded its operations to eastern Connecticut due to increased demand. The company, recognized for its top-notch roof replacement and repair services, opened the new office on April 16, 2025. This move was prompted by growing demand for their services in the area. North Scituate is located in Rhode Island, signifying the company's expansion outside the state border. The new office in eastern Connecticut aims to cater to the rising need for roofing solutions in the region. Bucci Roofing is renowned for its quality work and prompt service, making the expansion a strategic move to better serve customers in a new market. This development showcases the company's commitment to meeting the demands of its clientele, with the expansion setting the stage for broader service coverage beyond Rhode Island into neighboring states.
news.headline: Bucci Roofing expands into Connecticut, opening new office to meet growing demand. Leading roofing contractor from Rhode Island.

news.summary: The US federal government agencies now have the opportunity to utilize FMS:Workplace, a leading workplace management solution, after it received FedRAMP authorization. This system allows agencies to enhance their facilities and real estate operations for improved efficiency and financial outcomes. The authorization was granted on April 16, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina. This advancement will enable federal agencies to access top-notch services to better manage their workplace needs.
news.headline: FM:Systems' Workplace Management Solution, FMS:Workplace, is now FedRAMP authorized for U.S. federal government agencies to enhance facilities and real estate management.

news.summary: A deal was recently struck between HighBridge Premium and GALA Ventures where GALA has obtained exclusive rights to distribute the former's unique infused beverages to specific retailers. The collaboration, announced from Sheridan, Wyo., on April 16, 2025, aims to widen the reach of HighBridge products in the market. The agreement signifies a key step for HighBridge as it expands its distribution network, leveraging GALA's services to offer their high-quality beverages to a broader audience. This strategic move is expected to boost sales and visibility, potentially increasing revenue streams for the companies involved.
news.headline: HighBridge Premium partners with GALA Ventures for distribution in Wisconsin, expanding reach to select retailers.

news.summary: In Warsaw, Poland, on April 16, 2025, Mudita, a prominent company in mindful technology, unveiled the Mudita Kompakt, a sleek mobile phone aimed at aiding users in regaining their concentration and overall wellness. In response to the escalating prevalence of digital diversions, the Mudita Kompakt provides a solution for individuals seeking to prioritize focus and mental health.
news.headline: Mudita introduces Kompakt, an E Ink minimalist phone to promote digital well-being and focus.

news.summary: In La Jolla, CA, on April 16, 2025, GRI Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: GRI), a biotechnology firm focusing on Natural Killer T cell modulators for treating inflammatory, fibrotic, and autoimmune diseases, revealed that its abstract was chosen for a poster presentation at the 2025 ATS International Conference in San Francisco, CA from May 18-21, 2025. The presentation titled "Inactivation of iNKT Cells After the Inflammatory Phase Leads to Significant Inhibition of Fibroblast Activation and Fibrosis in a Model of Pulmonary Fibrosis" will be presented by Marc Hertz, PhD, the Chief Executive Officer of GRI Bio, on Wednesday, May 21, 2025, from 8:15-10:15 AM PT in Room 2022/2024 (West Building, Level 2), Moscone Center. For additional details about the conference, please refer to the conference website.
news.headline: GRI Bio's abstract selected for ATS Conference poster discussion on iNKT cells' role in fibrosis, presented by CEO on May 21.

news.summary: iRhythm Technologies has recently published its 2024 Corporate Sustainability Report showcasing its dedication to upholding high standards in quality and sustainability. The report highlights the company's continued efforts to promote a culture of excellence and sustainability across its operations. Key metrics and achievements are detailed in the report to provide transparency to stakeholders. This reflects iRhythm's commitment to advancing its sustainability practices and maintaining a focus on quality in its corporate operations.
news.headline: iRhythm released its 2024 Corporate Sustainability Report, showcasing commitment to quality and sustainability.

news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, VSee Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: VSEE), known for its AI-powered telehealth services, is making waves in the $787 billion digital healthcare market. Their latest achievement includes the launch of the Telenursing Robotics solution, which aims to streamline nursing tasks through automation. This innovation is crucial as nursing expenses typically make up around 60% of hospital operating budgets. By offering a modular, no-code/low-code platform, VSee Health, Inc. is set to revolutionize the industry and drive down labor costs.
news.headline: VSee Health's Telenursing Robotics aims to reduce hospital nursing costs by 3-5%, targeting 60% of operating budgets.

news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Redpoint Global and HCLTech to leverage their strengths in digital engagement and customer experience technology. The collaboration aims to enhance the capabilities of both companies in these areas. HCLTech is a leading global technology company with vast experience in digital solutions, while Redpoint Global specializes in customer engagement technology. The partnership will see them working together to deliver innovative solutions to their clients. This collaboration is significant in the industry and is expected to greatly benefit both companies.
news.headline: Redpoint Global and HCLTech team up for improved engagement, ROI using data-driven experience, 3X engagement, 2X ROI.Characters: 106

news.summary: In a joint announcement from New York and Atlanta, ICE Bonds, a division of Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE), introduced a new Request-for-Quote (RFQ) protocol for Mortgage-Backed Securities (MBS). This addition to ICE Bonds' services, along with the existing MBS Click-to-Trade marketplace, enables clients to submit MBS RFQs within ICE TMC's anonymous trading pool. The enhancement provides a broader range of execution options for MBS trading on the ICE TMC platform, reinforcing ICE's position as a key player in global technology and data services.
news.headline: ICE Bonds launches new RFQ protocol for MBS on ICE TMC, enhancing trading with anonymous pool.

news.summary: MajorKey Technologies, a top identity security firm based in Chicago, has recently completed the acquisition of Oxford Computer Group LLC. This move solidifies MajorKey's position in the market and represents a significant step in their growth strategy. The acquisition is set to bring together the expertise and resources of both companies, creating a formidable force in the industry. This strategic decision is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the identity security sector, with both companies seeing a surge in their market influence and reach.
news.headline: MajorKey Technologies buys Oxford Computer Group LLC, a market leader in identity security. #Acquisition #Tech

news.summary: In 2024, the migration of U.S. residents to Florida, Texas, and other Sun Belt areas decreased notably, as reported by Redfin. According to the report, Tampa experienced a net inflow of approximately 10,000 residents, a significant drop from the 35,000-person net inflow recorded the previous year. This decline marked the most substantial slowdown in domestic migration among the top 50 populous U.S. metros. Net inflow measures the number of individuals moving into an area.
news.headline: Migration to Florida and Texas slows: Tampa's net inflow drops to 10,000 in 2024 from 35,000 in 2023, impacting homebuyer demand.

news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, there was a surge in demand for market-rate apartments during the first quarter of the year, marking the strongest Q1 performance in RealPage's 32-year history of data collection.
news.headline: RealPage reports highest Q1 demand for market-rate apartments in 32 years, predicts modest growth momentum.

news.summary: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE) has appointed Kenneth Fearn and Christopher Krug as independent directors on its Board of Directors, effective April 17, 2025. Both individuals are seasoned in finance, bringing valuable expertise to the company. Mr. Fearn, a distinguished senior executive, and Mr. Krug, possess strong financial backgrounds that will benefit the Board.
news.headline: Greenidge Generation adds Kenneth Fearn and Christopher Krug to its board as independent directors, effective April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Norwell, Massachusetts - Clean Harbors, Inc. (NYSE: CLH), a top provider of environmental and industrial services across North America, is set to conduct a conference call to discuss its first-quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Co-Chief Executive Officers Michael L. Battles and Eric W. Gerstenberg, Chief Financial Officer Eric J. Dugas, and Senior Vice President of Investor Relations Jim Buckley will lead the discussion on Clean Harbors' financial performance.
news.headline: Clean Harbors (NYSE: CLH) to announce first-quarter 2025 financial results on April 30 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Key speakers include Co-CEOs, CFO, and SVP.

news.summary: San Antonio-based Valero Energy Corporation disclosed that its subsidiary, Valero Refining Company-California, has notified the California Energy Commission about its plans to potentially idle, restructure, or halt refining activities at Valero’s Benicia Refinery by April 2026. The company, listed on the NYSE as VLO, is assessing various strategic options for its other operations in California. This decision may affect the workforce and business but is part of Valero's ongoing evaluation and future planning.
news.headline: Valero plans to idle, restructure, or cease operations at its Benicia Refinery by April 2026, impacting employees and business.
China's Vice Premier He Lifeng: We encourage foreign trade enterprises to make good use of the canton fair platform and actively explore diversified markets.

news.summary: Miami-based Paper Point Corp., a top producer of paperboard frames for pleated HVAC filters, will be showcasing its products at the renowned International Filtration Conference & Exhibition (FiltXPO) from April 29 to May 1, 2025, at the Miami Beach Convention Center. With a strong presence in the filtration sector, Paper Point stands out as the primary manufacturer offering tailor-made solutions.
news.headline: "Paper Point Corp. to showcase at 2025 FiltXPO in Miami Beach, the top manufacturer of paperboard frames for HVAC filters."

news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) has extended its tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES). The offer includes $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock for each H&E share. This was pursuant to a merger agreement dated February 1. The offer is without interest.
news.headline: Herc Holdings extends tender offer for H&E Equipment Services, offering $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc stock per H&E share.

news.summary: Alder Packaging has announced a strategic partnership with Simex, an injection molding facility located in Medellín, Colombia. With over 55 years of experience, Simex is a well-established family-owned company. This collaboration aims to enhance Alder's sustainable packaging solutions and diversify their supply chain amidst fluctuating tariff policies. Founded in 1969, Simex is known for its expertise in manufacturing high-quality beauty products. The partnership will provide a reliable nearshore option for brands, facilitating smoother operations and ensuring continuity in the face of global supply chain disruptions.
news.headline: Alder Packaging partners with Simex for sustainable solutions; Simex: 55+yrs exp, based in Colombia, focuses on beauty.

news.summary: NÜRTINGEN, Germany - ADS-TEC Energy, a prominent player in battery-based energy storage and quick-charging systems, revealed that HyperFast, a component of the Energy Solutions Group overseeing the largest independent renewable energy production in Benelux, will utilize their ChargePost fast charging solution. With NASDAQ-listed ADSE, this move aims to enhance charging infrastructure. HyperFast's expertise will propel this expansion initiative.
news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy secures order for ChargePost fast-charging solution from HyperFast, part of Energy Solutions Group in Benelux.

news.summary: In Westlake, Texas, The Charles Schwab Corporation revealed a recent minority investment in Wealth.com, a top-rated estate planning platform in wealth management. The platform is pioneering a new approach for financial advisors in assisting clients of various wealth levels with estate planning. Schwab's investment aims to support Wealth.com in expanding its services, streamlining processes for financial firms and advisors to deliver essential estate planning assistance to individuals and families.
news.headline: Schwab invests in Wealth.com for estate planning, enhancing services for all wealth levels; boosting capabilities.

news.summary: China has recently secured a strategic partnership for the supply of matcha, aimed at expanding distribution in Asia and the UAE. This move comes as part of Reborn China's efforts to strengthen its presence in the market. The partnership will enable the company to access a steady supply of matcha, catering to the increasing demand for the product in the region. With this collaboration, Reborn China is set to increase its distribution network and reach a larger customer base. This initiative is expected to boost the company's growth and solidify its position in the market.
news.headline: China's Reborn secures matcha supply partnership to expand in Asia & UAE.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on April 16, 2025, OceanPal Inc. (NASDAQ: OP), a renowned global shipping firm focusing on vessel ownership, disclosed the submission of its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Interested parties can obtain the Annual Report via the Company’s website, www.oceanpal.com, or the SEC’s website, www.sec.gov. Shareholders have the option to request a physical copy of the full Annual Report at no cost.
news.headline: OceanPal Inc. files its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC, accessible online, available for hard copy requests.
China: We will fight till the end if our interests are harmed.
China's Vice Premier He Lifeng: China has very large market and huge consumption potential, provides a broad space for the import of high-quality products from other countries.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 16, 2025, Praecipio, a notable consulting firm, has revealed its collaboration with Apptio, a subsidiary of IBM recognized for its technology spend and value management software. This partnership marks Praecipio as an IBM Business Partner, enabling them to utilize Apptio's top-tier solutions.
news.headline: Praecipio and Apptio partner in Austin to drive smarter tech investments and optimize cost management for IBM.

news.summary: LabWare®, a leading provider of laboratory information management systems (LIMS), has introduced a new Software as a Service (SaaS) platform on April 16, 2025, based in Wilmington, Delaware. This innovative platform aims to transform food quality and safety by enabling digital traceability and ensuring compliance. With a focus on enhancing transparency and efficiency in the food industry, LabWare®'s new platform offers advanced solutions for tracking ingredients and products throughout the supply chain. This technology revolutionizes food safety practices by providing real-time monitoring and data analysis.
news.headline: LabWare® launches new SaaS platform "ASSURE" for food quality & safety on April 16, 2025 from Wilmington, Del.
